zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret de Normanville Lady Kenardington於大約1282年出生在英國肯特肯亞丁頓時，她的父親Sir Thomas de Normanville27歲，母親Dionisia Denise Lovetot23歲。她於1298年與William Basing Lord of Normanville在英國英格蘭盧特藍德艾平加姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。她去世於1341年10月15日在英國英格蘭素可迪胡爾斯特享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret de Normanville Lady Kenardington于大约1282年出生在英国肯特肯亞丁頓时，她的父亲Sir Thomas de Normanville27岁，母亲Dionisia Denise Lovetot23岁。她于1298年与William Basing Lord of Normanville在英国英格兰盧特藍德艾平加姆结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。她去世于1341年10月15日在英国英格兰素可迪胡爾斯特享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret de Normanville Lady Kenardington was born about 1282, in Kenardington, Kent, England, her father, Sir Thomas de Normanville, was 27 and her mother, Dionisia Denise Lovetot, was 23. She married William Basing Lord of Normanville in 1298, in Empingham, Rutland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. She died on 15 October 1341, in Ticehurst, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret de Normanville Lady Kenardington est née environ 1282, à Kenardington, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas de Normanville, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Dionisia Denise Lovetot, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé William Basing Lord of Normanville en 1298, à Empingham, Rutland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Elle est décédée le 15 octobre 1341, à Ticehurst, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret de Normanville Lady Kenardington um 1282 in Kenardington, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas de Normanville 27 und ihre Mutter Dionisia Denise Lovetot 23. Sie hat 1298 in Empingham, Rutland, England, United Kingdom William Basing Lord of Normanville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Sie starb am 15. Oktober 1341 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Ticehurst, Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Normanville Lady Kenardington è nata il circa 1282 nel Kenardington, Kent, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas de Normanville, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Dionisia Denise Lovetot, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato William Basing Lord of Normanville nel 1298, nel Empingham, Rutland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì il 15 ottobre 1341, nel Ticehurst, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret de Normanville Lady Kenardingtonが約1282年にイギリスケントケナルディントンで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas de Normanvilleは27歳，母Dionisia Denise Lovetotは23歳であった。1298年にイギリスイギリスルトランドエンパンガムでWilliam Basing Lord of Normanvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼女は1341年10月15日にイギリスイギリススセックスティセハルストで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret de Normanville Lady Kenardington(이)가 대략 1282년 영국 켄트 켄아르딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas de Normanville(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Dionisia Denise Lovetot(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1298년 영국 잉글랜드 루틀랜드 핀그함에서 William Basing Lord of Normanville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1341년 10월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 티스후르스트에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.1318/1319: de 9 de janeiro de 1318 a 8 de janeiro de 1320
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Normanville Lady Kenardington nasceu aproximadamente 1282, em Kenardington, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas de Normanville, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Dionisia Denise Lovetot, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com William Basing Lord of Normanville em 1298, em Empingham, Rutland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ela faleceu em 15 de outubro de 1341, em Ticehurst, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret de Normanville Lady Kenardington родилась около 1282 г. в местности кенардингтон, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas de Normanville было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Dionisia Denise Lovetot, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Basing Lord of Normanville в 1298 г. в местности эмпингхам, рутланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Она умерла 15 октября 1341 г. в местности таисэурст, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет.

Se casó con William Basing Lord of Normanville en 1298, en Empingham, Rutland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió el 15 de octubre de 1341, en Ticehurst, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 60 años.
